languages.text: Сотни имен вырезаны на мемориале и еще для тысяч остается место.
Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.
languages.original_text: Сотни имен вырезаны на мемориале и еще для тысяч остается место.

traits.locale_text: Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.
Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.
Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.
Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.

languages.text: 纪念碑上刻着数百个名字，其空位仍还能容纳成千上万个名字。
languages.original_text: Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.

traits.locale_text: 纪念碑上刻着数百个名字，其空位仍还能容纳成千上万个名字。

languages.text: Anıtın üzerine yüzlerce isim kazınmış, daha binlercesi için de yer var.
languages.original_text: Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.

traits.locale_text: Anıtın üzerine yüzlerce isim kazınmış, daha binlercesi için de yer var.

languages.text: Des centaines de noms sont déjà gravés sur le monument, mais il reste de la place pour des milliers d'autres.
languages.original_text: Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.

traits.locale_text: Des centaines de noms sont déjà gravés sur le monument, mais il reste de la place pour des milliers d'autres.

languages.text: Hay cientos de nombres grabados en el muro conmemorativo, y aún queda espacio para miles más.
languages.original_text: Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.

traits.locale_text: Hay cientos de nombres grabados en el muro conmemorativo, y aún queda espacio para miles más.

languages.text: In das Denkmal wurden bereits Hunderte von Namen graviert und tausende mehr finden noch Platz darauf.
languages.original_text: Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.

traits.locale_text: In das Denkmal wurden bereits Hunderte von Namen graviert und tausende mehr finden noch Platz darauf.

languages.text: 慰霊碑には数百もの名が刻まれ、なお来たるべき数千の名のための余白が残されている。
languages.original_text: Hundreds of names are etched upon the memorial, and space remains for thousands yet to come.

traits.locale_text: 慰霊碑には数百もの名が刻まれ、なお来たるべき数千の名のための余白が残されている。
